{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/8425791?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KoreaSecurity/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KoreaSecurity/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KoreaSecurity/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KoreaSecurity/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/KoreaSecurity", "id": 8425791, "login": "KoreaSecurity", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg0MjU3OTE=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KoreaSecurity/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KoreaSecurity/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KoreaSecurity/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KoreaSecurity/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KoreaSecurity/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/KoreaSecurity", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-33414", "cvss": {"score": 7.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 4.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:H/AT:N/PR:H/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:U"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-78", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection')"}], "description": "## Summary

A command injection vulnerability exists in Podman's HyperV machine backend. The VM image path is inserted into a PowerShell double-quoted string without sanitization, allowing `$()` subexpression injection.

## Affected Code

**File**: `pkg/machine/hyperv/stubber.go:647`

```go
resize := exec.Command("powershell", []string{
    "-command",
    fmt.Sprintf("Resize-VHD \"%s\" %d", imagePath.GetPath(), newSize.ToBytes()),
}...)
```



## Root Cause

PowerShell evaluates `$()` subexpressions inside double-quoted strings before executing the outer command. The `fmt.Sprintf` call places the user-controlled image path directly into double quotes without escaping or sanitization.

## Impact

An attacker who can control the VM image path (through a crafted machine name or image directory) can execute arbitrary PowerShell commands with the privileges of the Podman process on the Windows host. On typical Windows installations, this means SYSTEM-level code execution.


## Patch

https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/571c842bd357ee626019ea97d030fb772fc654ed

The affected code is only used on Windows, all other operating systems are not affected by this and can thus ignore the CVE patch.

## Credit

We like to thank Sang-Hoon Choi (@KoreaSecurity) for reporting this issue to us.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00607, "percentile": 0.4458}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-hc8w-h2mf-hp59", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-14T22:30:24Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hc8w-h2mf-hp59", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-hc8w-h2mf-hp59"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-33414"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-14T23:16:27Z", "published_at": "2026-04-14T22:30:24Z", "references": ["https://github.com/containers/podman/security/advisories/GHSA-hc8w-h2mf-hp59", "https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/571c842bd357ee626019ea97d030fb772fc654ed", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33414", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hc8w-h2mf-hp59"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/podman-container-tools/podman/security-advisories/GHSA-hc8w-h2mf-hp59", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/containers/podman", "summary": "PowerShell Command Injection in Podman HyperV Machine", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-27T16:31:36Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-hc8w-h2mf-hp59", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/containers/podman/v4"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.8.0, <= 4.9.5"}, {"first_patched_version": "5.8.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/containers/podman/v5"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 5.8.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: PowerShell Command Injection in Podman HyperV Machine
